tweets.name: Andreessen Horowitz
tweets.text:
“Coding will eat all knowledge work”

Peter Yang joins a16z’s Anish Acharya to discuss the post-AI future of work, why AI will create more solopreneurs, why human ambition means there will always be new jobs, and more.

tweets.name: Y Combinator
tweets.text:
We're excited to welcome Harshita Arora (@aroraharshita33) as YC's newest General Partner!

She started coding at 13, built and sold her first app as a teenager, and later co-founded AtoB (YC S20), a Series C company building financial infrastructure for the trucking industry, https://t.co/YVKfBflEkw

tweets.name: Y Combinator
tweets.text:
1 in 11 babies born in America this year will be screened by a genetic test that didn't exist a decade ago.

Biotech startup @BillionToOneInc turned a simple but radical idea—detecting rare fragments of fetal DNA in a mother's blood—into one of the most widely used prenatal tests https://t.co/fC7bqFg6cu
